footer.desc: A global community of prayerful, passionate, purpose-driven women growing in God's love. Roar Ladies Roar Ministry — Ladies on Fire for Christ.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Roar Ladies Roar Ministry. All rights reserved.

announcement.live: 🔴 LIVE NOW: {{topic}} is in progress! Join us online.
announcement.next: Next online gathering: This {{day}} at 9:00 PM GMT (starts in {{time}})
announcement.whatsappMsg: Hello RLR Ministry, please send me the link for the active gathering!

home.heroLead: A global community of prayerful, passionate and purpose-driven women, growing deeper in God, discovering our purpose, and transforming our world through His love.
home.tuesdayDesc: A dedicated hour of warfare prayer and intercession.
home.thursdayDesc: Sisters connecting to share testimonies and encourage one another.
home.sundayDesc: Worship, deep teaching from the Word, and prophetic prayers.
home.briefAboutText: Roar Ladies Roar Ministry is a global movement of women who refuse to stay silent in their faith. We pray, we study, we fellowship, and we build.

about.heroLead: Roar Ladies Roar Ministry is a global community of prayerful, passionate and purpose-driven women — growing deeper in God, discovering our purpose, and transforming our world through His love.
about.missionSub: To raise women who roar for Christ.
about.missionDesc: We exist to equip and empower women to grow in their relationship with God, walk in their God-given purpose, and impact their world with the love and power of Christ.
about.visionDesc: We envision a generation of women who reflect God's glory, advance His kingdom in every sphere of influence, and transform their communities from the inside out.
about.founderDesc1: Lady Pastor Mrs Tracy Anyomi is a woman of God, a visionary leader, and a passionate advocate for women in ministry. With a burning desire to see women walk fully in their God-given purpose, she founded Roar Ladies Roar Ministry — a global platform where women gather, grow, and go out as ambassadors of Christ.
about.founderDesc2: Under her leadership, the ministry has grown into a vibrant online community meeting three times a week, hosting the annual Encounter Conference, and impacting women across Africa, Europe, and beyond.
about.founderQuote: "We are women on fire for Christ — raised to roar with a louder voice, reflecting God's glory and advancing His kingdom."
about.faithDesc: We are rooted in the Word of God, trusting Him in every season of life.
about.communityDesc: We believe women grow stronger together — in prayer, in love, in purpose.
about.excellenceDesc: We pursue God's best in every area — spiritual, personal, and professional.
about.impactDesc: We are called to transform our families, communities, and nations through Christ.
about.ctaDesc: There is a place for you in this community. Come and grow with us.

conference.heroTitle: A sacred space to encounter God's presence.
conference.heroLead: Our annual gathering is designed for spiritual renewal — where women experience God, are equipped to live boldly, and are sent out to pursue their God-given purpose.
conference.expectLead: The Encounter Conference is more than an event — it's a divine appointment. Every element is crafted to bring you face-to-face with God and ignite the fire within you.
conference.worshipDesc: Encounter His presence in deep, unhurried worship that shifts atmospheres and transforms hearts.
conference.teachingDesc: Be equipped through anointed messages to live out your faith with boldness and clarity of purpose.
conference.prayerDesc: Experience the power of corporate prayer and intercession that moves mountains and shifts nations.
conference.fellowshipDesc: Build meaningful relationships with women who will carry you through the year and beyond.
conference.impartationDesc: Receive fresh fire, divine impartation, and commissioning to step into your God-given calling.
conference.transformationDesc: Leave renewed, restored, and fully equipped to impact your world for the Kingdom of God.
conference.dontMissDesc: The Encounter Conference fills up quickly. Register your interest now and be the first to receive updates, dates, and early-bird information.

connect.heroTitle: Join a gathering. Find your place.
connect.heroLead: Our online meetings are free, open to all women, and full of the presence of God. Find a time that works for you and show up — you will not be the same.
connect.meetingsSub: We meet online three times a week
connect.getLinkDesc: Fill in the form below or reach us via WhatsApp to receive the link.
connect.messageSub: We'd love to hear from you
connect.messageSuccessDesc: Thank you for reaching out. We'll be in touch shortly.
connect.prayerWallSub: Stand in prayer with your sisters
connect.prayerWallLead: "For where two or three gather in my name, there am I with them." — Matthew 18:20. Submit your request or lift up a sister in prayer today.
connect.submitRequestDesc: Your request will be posted on the wall. You can post anonymously.
connect.postedSuccessDesc: Sisters are standing in prayer with you.

give.heroLead: Every gift you give plants a seed of faith, purpose, and transformation in the life of a woman somewhere in the world. Thank you for partnering with us.
give.waysToGiveSub: Choose how you'd like to partner
give.giveDirectlyLead: You can make a direct transfer or mobile money payment. Please include your name in the description.
give.afterGiving: After giving, please send proof via WhatsApp so we can pray over your seed and acknowledge your partnership. 🙏
give.scripture: "Give, and it will be given to you. A good measure, pressed down, shaken together and running over, will be poured into your lap."

ticker.headline1: Welcome to Roar Ladies Roar Ministry — Ladies on Fire for Christ!
ticker.headline2: Midweek Prayer & Word: Tuesdays at 9:00 PM GMT online
ticker.headline3: Fellowship & Encouragement: Thursdays at 9:00 PM GMT online
ticker.headline4: Worship & Teaching: Sundays at 9:00 PM GMT online
ticker.headline5: Encounter 2026 Conference: Registration is now open! Stand in prayer with over 150 sisters.
ticker.headline6: Submit your prayer requests or stand in prayer with others on our new interactive Prayer Wall!
ticker.headline7: Partner with us: Sow a seed on our Give page to support global outreach and leadership training.
